subcodes.first_line: Although the Sun of Truth may outwardly be veiled by the clouds of concealment, were one to look with a perceiving eye
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگر چه شمس حقیقت بظاهر بغمام غیبت مجلل لکن چون بچشم بینا نگری و گوش شنوا
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @mystical themes, @growth of the Cause
